serviceHealth.command: echo "Postgres already running externally" && pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432
serviceHealth.observation: The externally managed Postgres dependency remained available; the setup command echoed the expected note and `pg_isready` returned `localhost:5432 - accepting connections`.

commands.observation: `turbo run build` completed successfully across the monorepo with no build errors; Prisma generate ran and the docs, remix, and openpage-api builds finished successfully.
`turbo run lint` exited 0 with warnings only: 37 in `@documenso/lib`, 17 in `@documenso/ui`, and 7 in `@documenso/trpc`; no lint errors blocked the milestone.
